utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey Chandler ! You know that girl you went to college with who ... who became a movie director ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh yeah , Dana Keystone . She was in my Movement class .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is Chandler way of pretending he did not take mime .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh well listen , anyway , she is directing the new Al Pacino movie . You gotta get me an audition !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , I do not know man . I have not talked to her in like ten years .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I have not talked to her in like ten years .
